projects.title: Project 1: IPL Player Performance Analysis
projects.description: Select a team and player of your choice from IPL matches. Collect run scores from each match they played. This will form the raw data which is to be grouped with a suitable class size. Calculate Mean, Mode and Median of the data. Comment on the three values.

projects.title: Project 2: IPL Final Match Over Analysis
projects.description: Collect the runs made in each over (6 balls) by both the teams in the final match. Calculate Mean, Median and Mode for both teams' data.

projects.title: Project 3: Temperature Analysis Over Years
projects.description: Collect average temperature of Earth and India as on 23rd April of all the years from 2010 to 2026. Calculate Mean by using a suitable method. Give the reason for choosing the method.

projects.title: Project 4: Exercise Practice
projects.description: Complete all the problems from exercises of chapters discussed in class. Chapters: Arithmetic Progressions, Number System, Polynomials, Quadratic Equations, Statistics and Probability.

exercises.instruction: Complete all the problems from exercises of chapters discussed in class.

content.materials: Notebook, graph paper, colored pens/pencils, internet access for data collection
content.submission: Submit your holiday notebook with all four projects and exercise problems neatly presented with proper calculations and diagrams.

grading.belowAverage: Completes 2-3 projects and partial exercises with basic calculations.
grading.average: Completes all 4 projects and exercises with neat diagrams and proper calculations.
grading.bright: Completes all projects and exercises with creative presentation, proper labeling, and additional insights.
